name: Tuna Patties
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Tuna, drained and finely flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except shortening together and form into patties.
2. Melt shortening in a heavy skillet and sauté the patties until golden brown.
3. Drain on absorbent paper.
4. Serve hot with sauce or chill for several hours or overnight and serve cold with Cucumber Sauce.
5. To make Cucumber Sauce, mix all ingredients well and chill.
6. For Sour Cream Sauce, saute onion in butter. Lower heat and stir in sour cream and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve over hot patties.
